places.name: Colossal Squid
places.description: The world's only complete colossal squid specimen is on display at the Te Papa Museum.

places.name: Weta Cave
places.description: Inside this faux cave, visitors can learn how some of their favorite fantasy characters were created.

places.name: Mrs. Chippy Monument
places.description: A bronze kitty adorns the grave of the polar explorer who brought the original feline to the Antarctic.

places.name: Wrights Hill Fortress
places.description: Anyone wanting to know what a dwarven mine sounds like need only visit the tunnels of this New Zealand artillery compound.

places.name: Wellington Cable Car
places.description: New Zealand's only running funicular railway.

places.name: Quasi
places.description: The 16-foot sculpture of a hand looks out from his perch on top of an art gallery.

places.name: Moniac Machine
places.description: A strange machine made to evaluate the world economy using water and lots of tubes.

places.name: Hiakai
places.description: This fine-dining restaurant features native New Zealand ingredients and Māori cooking.
